free_text: Measurement of cross sections for 22Na, 20-22Ne and
36-42Ar in the spallation of Mg, Al, Si, Ca and Fe.
Production ratios of some cosmogenic nuclides in
meteorites
at 0.059 and 0.075 GeV
at 1.0, 1.05 and 2.5 GeV
at 0.600 GeV and 24 GeV.
Pure target foils of Mg, (99.9% or 3N), Al(5N) and
Fe(5N), and also crystals of Si(4N) and CaF2(4N) were
stacked, with monitor and guard Al(5N) foils. Exact
thickness was determined by weighing and was
(20 to 50)*0.001 mm for foils, and 0.6 to 1 mm for
crystals.
No information about source of uncertainty
SB

SD: Correction in Subent 025.
